question: What is difference between the Lump Sum and Monthly plan?
reply: The biggest difference is the short-term versus long-term costs. With the lump sum, you pay a one-time fee for the project, while with the monthly plan, you are spreading out the cost over time. Over time you'll likely save money with the lump sum, but paying a smaller monthly fee is more manageable for many businesses. It all comes down to cash flow and short- versus long-term goals.

question: Can I add on 24/7 Support, Lifetime Updates, or other features to the Lump Sum plan?
reply: Yes, we offer add-ons to any of our plans, typically with a 12 month commitment. This helps us plan for the future and ensures we can continue to support you long-term. We can also work out a custom plan for you if you need something specific.

question: Can I change or cancel my Monthly subscription plan at any time?
reply: The Monthly plan is contract-based and typically starts with a minimum 12 month commitment, and after that is month to month. You can cancel anytime after the contract commitment time has passed. If you do decide to cancel, we have options to help you with the transition, whether that is shutting down the site, paying a one-time transfer fee, or other options.

question: What happens if I cancel my Monthly subscription plan before the contract commitment time has passed?
reply: We prioritize building long-term relationships with our clients, and hope our clients reciprocate. We also understand that sometimes things change out of our control. Typically, you would be responsible for the full remaining contract amount, but we are happy to find a solution that works for both parties.

question: How do additional pages work?
reply: Many simple websites require 5 or less pages, but we find that a lot of websites need more than 5 pages, and we offer a $100/page fee after the first 5 pages. This is a one-time fee, and you can add as many pages as you need. There is no limit to the number of pages you can add, and we can offer discounts for larger projects.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
reply: Our invoicing software Wave securely handles the payments, and you can pay with Apple Pay or any major card: Visa, Visa Debit, Mastercard, Mastercard Debit, and American Express. Invoices are sent via email, and you can also set up recurring payments for the Monthly plan.

question: Can you tell me more about the Custom plan?
reply: Some projects are just more complex than others, whether that is due to complex business logic, custom API integrations, building out an e-commerce store, scaffolding a Content Management System (CMS), or other unique requirements. With nearly two decades of experience each, we have the expertise to handle even the most complex projects. We offer a custom plan for these projects, and we can work with you to design a plan that works best for you.

question: Can I use Foxi with Google Calendar?
reply: Yes, Foxi integrates seamlessly with Google Calendar for easy scheduling and task management. This integration helps you keep track of your events and tasks in one place.

question: Does Foxi work with Slack?
reply: Yes, you can integrate Foxi with Slack to receive notifications and updates directly in your channels. This allows you to stay informed about your projects without leaving Slack.

question: How do I connect Foxi with Trello?
reply: To connect Foxi with Trello, go to the integrations page in your settings and follow the instructions to link your accounts. This integration helps you manage your Trello boards and Foxi projects together.

question: Is there an API for custom integrations?
reply: Yes, we provide an API that allows you to create custom integrations with Foxi. Our API documentation provides detailed instructions and examples to help you get started.

question: Can I sync Foxi with my email?
reply: Currently, we do not support email integration, but this feature is on our roadmap for future releases. Stay tuned for updates as we continue to enhance Foxi's capabilities.

question: Does Foxi support Zapier?
reply: Yes, Foxi integrates with Zapier, allowing you to connect with over 2,000 apps and automate your workflows. This integration helps you streamline your processes and improve efficiency.

question: What are the main features of Foxi?
reply: Foxi includes in-app messaging, project management, time tracking, customizable dashboards, and more. These features are designed to help you stay organized, communicate effectively, and manage your time efficiently.

question: How do I use the in-app messaging feature?
reply: In-app messaging allows you to communicate with your team directly within Foxi. Simply navigate to the messaging tab to start a conversation. You can send messages, share files, and create group chats.

question: Can I customize my dashboard?
reply: Yes, you can customize your dashboard by adding, removing, and rearranging widgets to fit your workflow. This customization helps you keep important information at your fingertips.

question: How does the time tracking feature work?
reply: Time tracking allows you to log the time spent on tasks and projects. Start the timer when you begin a task and stop it when you're done. You can also manually log time if needed.

question: Is there a mobile app for Foxi?
reply: Yes, Foxi is available on both iOS and Android, allowing you to manage your tasks and projects on the go. Download the app from the App Store or Google Play to stay productive anywhere.
